docs.title: 👋 About Me
docs.text:
Hi, I'm Shahroz — a passionate learner in the field of Data Analytics with a strong interest in working with data and solving real-world problems through insights.

Currently, I am working at Sybrid Karachi as a Technical Support Team Lead, where I manage support operations and contribute to technical problem-solving in a fast-paced environment.

docs.title: 💻 What I Do
docs.text:
I enjoy working with data, learning new technologies, and building efficient solutions. My main focus areas include:

  • 📊 Data Analysis & Data Visualization
  • 🐍 Python for Data Handling
  • 🗄️ SQL for Database Queries
  • 📈 Power BI Dashboards
  • 📊 Tableau Visualization

docs.title: Conclusion
docs.text: Building this portfolio was more than just creating a website. It was an opportunity to present my projects, skills, and learning journey in a structured and professional way.

docs.title: My Journey into Data Analytics
docs.text:
I started my career in Technical Support, where I developed problem-solving and troubleshooting skills. While working in support, I discovered my interest in data analysis and automation.

My learning journey included:

  • Python Programming
  • Pandas for Data Analysis
  • SQL & Database Queries
  • Data Visualization
  • Automation Scripts

I am currently building projects and expanding my skills to transition into a data-focused role.

My goal is to work remotely as a Data Analyst or Python Automation Developer and continue learning modern data technologies.

docs.title: Why I Chose Python
docs.text:
Python is one of the most beginner-friendly and powerful programming languages available today.

Some reasons why I enjoy working with Python:

  • Simple syntax
  • Large community support
  • Excellent data analysis libraries
  • Automation capabilities
  • Strong career opportunities

I use Python for data analysis, automation, and personal projects. Its flexibility allows me to quickly turn ideas into working solutions.

docs.title: 🌊 Water Turbidity Monitoring System
docs.text: 👤 Rao Muhammad Shahroz 📅 2024-02-01

docs.title: 📌 Overview
docs.text:
The Water Turbidity Monitoring System is an Arduino-based embedded project designed to monitor water quality in real time.

It automatically controls a water pump based on turbidity levels and odor detection, ensuring safe and efficient water management through intelligent automation.

The system continuously evaluates water conditions using multiple sensors and triggers safety actions whenever abnormal readings are detected.

docs.title: 🧰 Tools & Components Used
docs.text: 🔌 Arduino Uno 🌊 Turbidity Sensor 🧪 Gas Sensor ⚡ Relay Module 💧 Water Pump 📟 LED Display 💻 C++ (Arduino Programming)

docs.title: 🔄 System Workflow
docs.text:
• 🌊 Turbidity sensor → measures water clarity
  • 🧪 Gas sensor → detects odor / contamination
  • 🧠 Arduino → processes data in real time
  • ⚡ Relay module → controls water pump
  • 🚨 Safety system → stops pump on bad water quality
  • 📟 LED display → shows live status & readings

docs.title: ⭐ Key Features
docs.text:
• 🌊 Real-time monitoring of water quality
  • 🧪 Gas sensor-based odor detection
  • ⚙️ Automated pump control system
  • 🚨 Safety mechanism for automatic shutdown
  • 📟 Live system status display
  • 🤖 Embedded automation using Arduino

docs.title: 📄 FIR Application
docs.text:
👤 Rao Muhammad Shahroz 📅 2024-02-01

🖥️ Desktop-based FIR Management System developed using .NET and C#.

Tech Stack:

🔗 View Project

docs.title: 📌 Overview
docs.text: A desktop FIR management system that allows users to register and track FIRs online.

docs.title: 🔥 Key Features
docs.text:
• Online FIR registration
  • Case tracking system
  • Duplicate detection (same item in multiple cities)
  • Auto notification system for owner alerts
  • Inter-city record synchronization

docs.title: 💡 Real Example
docs.text: If a bike is stolen in one city and later found in another city: - System detects duplicate entry - Updates status automatically - Sends alert to owner

docs.title: 💻 Technologies Used
docs.text:
• C# (.NET Framework)
  • MySQL Database
  • Windows Desktop Application
